findings.title: Add negative coverage for the new URMA failover gflag validators
findings.impact: The PR adds validation branches that reject non-finite or out-of-range success-rate ratios and a zero min-sample count, but the added UT/ST coverage only exercises accepted values and hot updates. A future regression could accidentally accept NaN, ratios outside [0,1], or min_sample_count=0 and the failover control loop would run with invalid configuration without a failing test.
findings.fix: Add a focused gflag/validator unit test that asserts urma_failover_success_rate_ratio accepts 0.0, 0.5, and 1.0 but rejects NaN, infinity, negative values, and values greater than 1.0, and asserts urma_failover_min_sample_count rejects 0 while accepting positive values.
